description: Executable ownership contract for modernizing stale metamorphic API-drift suites one file group at a time.

claim_protocol.cargo_proof_command: rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_p7 cargo test -p asupersync --test metamorphic_api_drift_ownership_contract -- --nocapture

failure_patterns.description: Proptest diagnostics can move owned fields before later assertions or borrows.
failure_patterns.modernization_rule: Pin Copy fields to locals and clone owned strings before prop_assert_eq or assert_eq diagnostics consume them.

failure_patterns.description: Proptest helpers sometimes drift from strategies to scalar values in prop_oneof or collection strategy slots.
failure_patterns.modernization_rule: Keep arbitrary helpers returning impl Strategy or BoxedStrategy, and wrap fixed values with Just(value).

failure_patterns.description: Integration suites can bit-rot by importing private implementation modules instead of public exports.
failure_patterns.modernization_rule: Use crate public exports or move the assertion next to the implementation as an inline cfg(test) module.

failure_patterns.description: Typed IDs and proof kinds drift when tests compare implementation projections directly.
failure_patterns.modernization_rule: Compare stable public projections and pin proof-kind values before diagnostic assertions.

failure_patterns.description: Large metamorphic suites often assert directly on full snapshots whose fields change independently of the property under test.
failure_patterns.modernization_rule: Project snapshots into stable, property-specific structs before comparing.
failure_patterns.allowed_example:
struct SnapshotProjection { pending: usize, busy: usize }
prop_assert_eq!(projection_before, projection_after, "scheduler projection drift");

evidence_markers: Pin scalar fields by value before the prop_assert_eq! moves them;
ownership_surfaces.next_batch_rule: If this row regresses, keep the fix in src/fs_config_metamorphic_tests.rs and run the focused lib-test filter for mr_env_config_env_roundtrip.

evidence_markers: Clone the borrowed fields so prop_assert_eq! doesn't partially-move
ownership_surfaces.next_batch_rule: If this row regresses, keep header-folding semantics intact and clone only the moved diagnostic fields.
Pin proof kind projections to locals, preserve reserve-send and direct-send semantics, then run the focused metamorphic_session_channels MR2 test.
If this row regresses, keep fixed jitter enum values wrapped in Just(...) and preserve the Strategy return type.

evidence_markers: DO NOT re-wire without first fixing the broken imports.
ownership_surfaces.next_batch_rule: Before re-wiring a dormant conformance module, either move assertions next to private implementation details or switch imports to public exports.
Project only the blocking-pool counters named by the MR before comparing snapshots.
